title: WorkItem
description: Abstract parent of all Cloverleaf trackable units (RFC, Spike, Plan, Task).
$comment: Permissive at the abstract level (additionalProperties: true); concrete types (rfc/spike/plan/task) tighten via additionalProperties: false. Reusable component definitions live under $defs and are $ref'd by per-type schemas.

status.description: Lifecycle status. The set of valid statuses depends on the concrete type and is defined in per-type schemas.

relationships.description: Typed links to other Work Items. Replaces the v0.1 dependencies[] field. The Plan's task_dag is compiled from relationships where type='blocks'.

workItemId.description: A non-empty Work Item id (local to its project).

workItemRef.description: Qualified reference to a Work Item in a known project.

workItemRefOrNull.description: A qualified Work Item reference, or null when no parent/link applies.

relationshipType.description: Canonical relationship vocabulary. 9 values: 4 pairs of explicit inverses plus the symmetric relates_to. Teams may add custom types under extensions.team.relationship_type.

owner.description: Identifies who owns a Work Item — a human or an agent. A subset of actor: ownership is restricted to addressable parties (no system).

actor.description: Identifies who triggered an action — a human, an agent, or the system itself (for automated transitions). Used by event schemas. Superset of owner.
